pages.text: Each PreFab has 6 faces that can be independently configured:

pages.title: Face Modes
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)$(bold)PULL$():$() Extract from Overworld → Transport to CM Importer - Overworld → CM $(li)$(bold)$(bold)PUSH$():$() Extract from CM Exporter → Transport to Overworld - CM → Overworld $(li)$(bold)$(bold)DISABLED$():$() Face inactive (no resource transport) - N/A

pages.title: Resource Filters
pages.text: $(li)$(bold)$(bold)ITEMS$():$() Transfer items only (ItemStacks) - [DONE] Implemented $(li)$(bold)$(bold)FLUIDS$():$() Transfer fluids only (FluidStacks) - [WIP] Future $(li)$(bold)$(bold)ENERGY$():$() Transfer energy only (FE/RF) - [WIP] Future $(li)$(bold)$(bold)ALL$():$() Transfer all resource types - [WIP] Future

pages.title: Target Selection
pages.text: Each face must link to a specific Importer or Exporter: $(li)$(bold)PULL faces$() link to Importers (inside CM dimension) $(li)$(bold)PUSH faces$() link to Exporters (inside CM dimension) $(li)Linking is done via UUID (unique identifier) $(li)Select target from dropdown in configuration GUI
